Name: A@H2O
About:
A@H20, AKA Herden Lollia, is a self-taught musician,DJ, radio producer, music producer and chiropractor of Zen Shiatsu, based in Karystos/Evia. Founding member of the Greek post-punk groups "Ends With The Sea" (1983-1984) & "Winter Watercolors" (1984-1988) as a guitarist, singer, lyricist and composer.

In 2016, he released an album of his 2 groups entitled "Years 1984-1988" on Geheimnis Records. He has also composed scores for contemporary dance performances, video art and short films.

A pioneer of the local freestyle DJ scene, A@H2O started DJing in 1984 and continues to this day. A member of some of the most productive underground parties during the 00's (Muzak7, ZuLuTeK!, What! Street Party, Bass Class).

Active Radio producer at Paranoise Radio & Stegi Radio. He writes extensively in the local music press. Formerly a radio producer on Radiobubble, Channel 15 and Free FM.

Name: Abel Simof
About:
SPINING RECORDS FROM 90's BASED ON BASS. Abel Simof is a DJ and event promoter. He’s been a radio producer for Super FM and 88.5 stations. He was also a member of the art and music groups d2 and lowdown in the late nineties and early 00's who embraced contemporary sounds based on hip hop, techno, drum n bass & UKG music genres and generally the bass culture of the British scene and beyond, intersecting with contemporary visual arts.

Expect dark,  jazzy and deep bass and atmospheric melodies spanning on the whole range of contemporary electronic music and bpm, on paranoise radio monthly 2 hour set.

Name: Adne
About: Adne is experimenting with lots of kinds of music to create what she calls 'sonic postcards' and evoke feelings of nostalgia for the past, futuristic dream-states and intense moments in the present.

Name: Aear0n
About:
Aear0n, an emerging artist in the electronic music scene, blends deep melodic techno, future garage, and ambient sounds to create a unique and evocative auditory experience. His music is characterized by its melancholic, deep, and dark vibes, often exploring themes of depression, trauma, and the darker shades of human emotion.

Aear0n's journey into music production was reignited in 2023 after a long hiatus, reviving a passion that had been dormant. Inspired by space, particularly inner space, his sound is infused with a mystic quality that resonates deeply with listeners. Thriving underground rhythms influenced by Berlin's electronic music scene add an edge to his compositions. Drawing inspiration from his own life, Aear0n aims to raise awareness for mental health, using his music as a vehicle for healing and connection.

A self-taught DJ, Aear0n’s ability to blend genres and emotions into seamless sets has made him a rising figure in the electronic underground. With his radio show, The Basement on Paranoise Radio, Aear0n offers listeners not just a reason to dance, but a chance to immerse themselves in their emotions while raising awareness for mental health. His show combines his signature dark, melodic vibes with introspective soundscapes, creating a space where listeners can reflect, heal, and connect.

Supported by Dark Heart Recordings, Aear0n has begun to make waves in the industry. His LP, Illicit Legacy, set to release on May 31st, 2024, on his 30th birthday, is a testament to his resilience and artistic vision. This LP is more than just music; it’s a narrative of survival and self-discovery.

Before using music as therapy during long-term sick leave, Aear0n worked as a nurse in an emergency room for psychiatric and neurologic diseases. His personal experiences deeply inform his music. Through his compositions and sets, Aear0n shares his story of overcoming adversity, offering a sonic journey that is both deeply personal and universally relatable.

‍

Name: Andrea De Niro
About:
Welcome to WOW&FLUTTER, where every month, we’ll dive into the freshest, handpicked vinyl releases. Expect a sonic journey filled with deep, hypnotic sounds, and intricate patterns, all delivered live and straight from the decks. Each episode is a celebration of underground artistry, crafted from the latest vinyl drops, offering a unique listening experience with raw, authentic, and immersive soundscapes. Tune in, feel the pulse, and let the grooves take you beyond the ordinary.

Name: Azem
About:
Azem is a Greek dj/producer/engineer involved in all-about-sound, currently living in Malmö, Sweden. He has been a member and radio producer in the Paranoise Radio team since 2019. As a dj he is always trying to blend various genres and vibes with an exploratory mood, although heis always driven by a love for bass music and dark groovy beats, regardless of categories or boundaries.  

He grew up with hip hop but he got fascinated by the early rave culture in the 90s and the breakbeat scene as well as the drumnbass explosion in Europe after 2000.

Nowadays, he brings different sounds together in a genre-fluid musical approach, every 3rd Sunday of the month, on the “Subfernalia”radio show.

He has also worked on for soundtrack composition and production of music albums, such as the VA PRNS 001, 002, 003 landmark compilations of the Paranoise Radio family.

Name: Back A Yard Athens
Radio show: Back A Yard Athens Radio Show
About: 'Back A Yard Athens'' is a monthly all Reggae styles dance founded in Athens, GR in February 2017.  We have already worked with international artists such like Serial Killaz [UK], DJ Vadim [UK / RU], Jacky Murda [USA], Parly B [UK], Aries [UK], Dreadsquad [PL], Blend Mishkin [GR], Jstar [UK], , Fleck [GR], Vixen Sound [UK] to name a selected few.

Name: Basic-Space
About: Basic-Space is Christos Kofinas, long-time resident, DJ and producer hailing from Zurich. In his radio show he shuffles between the deepest layers of drum and bass to any modern bass driven forms, lots of Lo-fi Percussions and industrial, mutated sounds.

Name: Brook Haven
About: Moody electronic sounds, ranging ranging from broken beats, to future garage, with some leftfield minimal techno and ambient sprinkled here and there.

Name: Bullet 46
About:
Oνομάζομαι Στέφανος Νταγιακος (Bullet 46) από την Αθήνα. Είμαι beatmaker και DJ και ασχολούμαι κυρίως με τα μουσικά είδη Jungle / DnB / Hardcore.Δισκογραφικά (σε αυτή την σκηνή) υπάρχω από το 2023 και έχω συνεργαστεί με labels όπως την evil audio του Cryogenics και την Umai records της Aisatsaana και του Eusebeia.

//

My name is Stefanos Dayakos (Bullet 46) from Athens. I'm a beatmaker and DJ and I an mainly into Jungle / DnB / Hardcore music genres.

Record-wise (in this scene) I have been around since 2023 and have collaborated with labels such as Cryogenics' Evil Audio, Aisatsaana's and Eusebeia's Umai Records.

‍

Name: Chriz
About: Chriz is a veteran Paranoiser, and one of the founding fathers of Paranoise radio and the Momentvm collective in Zurich. He moved from his hometown Thessaloniki to Manchester in the early 2010s, and immersed himself into the enthralling soundscapes of the North of England. An avid vinyl collector and DJ, he’s been running his radio show 'Beats In Junktion' for 15 years where he explores electronic sounds beyond the ordinary and the habitual. You can catch him on air every second Friday of the month.

Name: Coeden
About:
Coeden is the main musical project of Guillo, with releases between ambient, experimental and dub in labels such as Natural Sciences, Hide Productions and Entagled Visions.

His show is focused on experimental and dubby sounds, a mix of unreleased materials, samples, rarities and other tracks, creating particular atmospheres and narrations in every show, with often guests.

Name: Cryogenics
About:
Cryogenics is an Athens based drum&bass DJ and producer with numerous releases in labels such as Omni Music, Boomsha Recordings, Convoluted Recordings, Liquid Drops, Monochrome Recordings, Minus32, Kraak Records. He also runs his own imprints Audio Theory and Evil Audio and has shared the stage with some of the most prominent names in the scene such as LTJ Bukem, Blu Mar Ten, Goldie, Spirit, Seba, Om Unit, Ed Rush, Doc Scott, Dom & Roland, Kryptic Minds, Commix, Equinox, Bizzy B, Chris Inperspective, Paradox, Phil Source (Source Direct), Big Bud and many more.

In his Subworld radio show Cryogenics will be diving into the heart of his signature sound, bringing on air mind bending mixes and exclusive tracks

Name: Daddy Vertigo
About:
The journey officially began in 2007 in Sitia Crete. A year later Andronikos (Daddy Vertigo) started his first radio show which lasts until today.

Over the years he entered the mentality of Dj set..Followed many Dj Sets in Greece with highlights participations in charitable events.All of these years blended various genres of music until and the finalmixture is based in Jamaican sounds..Υardie beats from Reggae Dub,Ragga,Hip Hop with a special preference in Digital sounds but also many influences from all around the Caribbean musical culture compose his sound..

Since 2017 and spending his second decade  has been experimenting on remixes with four releases for free download.In 2011 he created his own web radio (www.radiospirit.gr) and made many parties and concerts with big names of the Greek scene.In 2014 he joined the 101.5 radio mix for Guest Dj Zone until the beginning of 2016 and 2017 to 2019,his own show '' The Cranky Monkey '' was hosted on the Athenian Radio Milk and Chocolate.In 2019 the show changed home and is now hosted by Paranoise Radio (Thessaloniki) to this day.Founder of Gruppo del Este familia created in 2014.It's a family of passionate people with music.

A Djs collective that their mission is to ''stick'' their germ everywhere..In 2015 he made the dj duo of the ragga cakes named ''Ragga Muffins'' with Positive Vibes. In 2015,2016,2017,2018 and 2019 was hosted in Reggae Vibes Music Festival and shared the stage with names like : The Wailers,Krak In Dub,Dreadzone,Vibronics,Zion Train,Μad Professor,SKG'S Dub Alliance and MC's like Skarra Mucci, Earl 16,Madu Messenger, Mc Brother Culture,Mc Yinka,J Fyah and more.Has shared the booth/stage with names like: Anna Mystic,Professor Skank,Blend Mishkin,Big Shine,Dj Tzinas,Essen K,ThatStyle,Funkanizer,Digital Monk,CayetanoMc Sensee,Mr BiGK,Bass Delight and many more.

Name: DEPPYT
About: Athens, Greece based DJ/radio producer. Former program director and producer at Radio Xanthi 93,5. Co-organizer and communication representative at 1st Festival of Queer Approaches in Xanthi.

Name: DJ Grazzhoppa
About:
DJ Grazzhoppa aka Grazz is Wim Verbrugghe a seasoned hiphop producer from Ghent, Belgium. After winning several local DJ battles he became  European DMC Champion in 1991,  Belgian Champion I.T.F. in 1998  and 3rd in the I.T.F. World Championships in 1998.

In the late '80s he formed Rhyme Cut Core with rapper TLP,  later joined by Dennis Wurl (Jamaica) and Showbiz (UK).He then joined forces with Mr. Greedy (UK) and started Greedy-Fingers Productions. Grazz also does cuts & production for De Puta Madre, together with Smimooz they form Solis Vs. Green.  

He also works with groups around R.A.B. (the full crew of the De Puta Madre),  Lickweed (Uman & Krayzee), Armada now Kingsize (Lee Manso, Modal, Karim)  and for the solo projects of Pee Gonzales, Prof Violet and Rayer. 

Other production teams are cratediggers: D.V.L., Ame & Grazz as Afterhours. They produced 2 DJ battle albums, 3 EP's and numerous mixtapes.Grazz released with graffiti bombing crew Dehael four 12inches  and the soundtrack for the comic book Project Grow, created by Jamoz of Jasta. 

In 2003 Grazz founded DJ Grazzhoppa's DJ Bigband. 6 DJ'S, 7 turntables, 6 mixers, 1 sax and a mic  were used in this unique project to create a turntablist extravaganza. In 2004, they expanded to 12 DJ's and then added Aka Moon to the mix.

In 2008, a new set called "Around The World In 80 Beats" went on the road. In 2010 the DJ Bigband comes back with "Back To Scratch", 6 Dj's + Monique Harcum.

Grazzhoppa & Monique Harcum (USA) are "Mo & Grazz". "Fallin' Upon Def Ears" the first album was released in 2006. The second album by Mo & Grazz "Gemini" is released on Feayherpern Records (USA).

‍

Paranoise is one of the selected radio stations worldwide to broadcast Grazz'z Hop2This mix series

‍

Name: Doctore Xyramat
About: Xyramat is a musician, producer and radio host. In her radio shows she is shuffling through experimental music with a main focus on female artists.

Name: E.H.
About: Currently living in Barcelona DJing, collecting and selecting tunes as well as producing for various radio stations.

Name: Female:Pressure
About:
Female:pressure is a transnational online database and network of women*, AFAB, transgender, transfeminine, transmasculine, intersex [+gender optional], genderqueer, gender nonconforming, a-gender and/or non-binary DJs, musicians, composers, producers, visual artists, agents, journalists and researchers working in the realms of electronic music and visual arts. It is a publicly accessible source of information, a means of communication and a tool to disclose the existence and the work of women*, non-binary, transgender and gender fluid people in this seemingly cis-male dominated field.

Founded by Vienna based Electric Indigo in 1998, female:pressure is the technological answer to the recurring assertions of an alleged lack of female* artists in this field. The project started out as a simple html list until Viennese media artist and open source expert Andrea Mayr programmed the database in 2001. With about 180 listed artists from 19 countries 20 years ago, female:pressure can now be proud of including over 3000 members from 86 countries [August 2023]. Members can log in and update their individual profile, most of the profiles link to the artists' web pages and contain contact information.

‍

Paranoise is hosting the female:pressure podcast with music presented by its members

‍

Name: Φί Κάπα
About: Born and raised in Komotini Φί Κάπα aka Filippos Karapatsios started djing and radio broadcasts from the early age of 14. On 1995 he started exploring the emerging electronic European scene. He felt absorbed from the irresistible sound of jungle , breakbeat, house, techno, ambient and IDM. He used to travel monthly to Thessaloniki in order to discover groundbreaking music to share with his homies  before airing them in the local radio station. He started experimenting with various genres playing free of labels and genres sets. Everything became even more simple and obvious with the use of the internet where he started to discover more obscure and taste sensitive sounds from like minded people. He is a vinyl collector and he is now obsessed  with music production and remixing, mainly for his own satisfaction. He still feels the  endless thirst of hunting for the most forward thinking music around.

Name: Flynt
About:
O Flynt είναι κατάσκοπος από άλλο πλανήτη, εδώ και χρόνια στάλθηκε στην γη με σκοπό να μελετήσει το ανθρώπινο είδος αλλά μετά από τόσα χρόνια δεν κατάφερε ακόμη να τους καταλάβει. Αυτό που τον κρατάει ακόμα στην γη είναι μόνο η μουσική. Το όχημά του είναι το ηλεκτρικό πρόβατο (electric sheep) και κάθε Τρίτη μεσάνυχτα απογειώνεται με ήχους απ' όλο τον κόσμο, περιλαμβάνοντας ένα ευρύ φάσμα μουσικών αποχρώσεων της σύγχρονης ανεξάρτητης μουσικής σκηνής.

‍

Flynt is a spy from another planet, sent to earth many years ago to investigate our species. So far he has not understood much and music is the only thing keeping him on our planet. His vessel is the Electric Sheep and weekly at midnight every Tuesday it takes of with sounds from all over, including a wide spectrum of the contemporary independent music scene.

Name: GNNS x SigmaTheta
About:
error 404 is a radio project focused on contemporary techno.It showcases raw and hypnotic sounds through sets by GNNS / SigmaTheta and selected guests.The aim is to highlight the pure aesthetic and authentic energy of the scene.

GNNS is a DJ emerging from the underground scene of Chania, Crete. His sound embodies the essence of contemporary techno — deep, precise, and kinetic — crafted to build tension, momentum, and internal motion without excess. Rooted in the hypnotic and atmospheric side of the genre, his sets focus on flow and subtle progression, weaving intricate rhythms into cohesive, evolving sonic landscapes.
(https://www.instagram.com/gnns____)

SigmaTheta, based in Chania, Crete, delivers a powerful techno set focused on flow and rhythm. Her sound is raw, driving, and intentional — crafted to move the body and sustain intensity without pause.Her journey into electronic music began during her teenage years, gradually shaping a sound deeply rooted in the underground. Each of her sets is a distinct experience, defined by precise sound selection and a dance-inducing atmosphere built with instinct and control.

(https://www.instagram.com/sigmatheta_)

‍

Name: Gotanine
About:
Antigone Iliadi aka Gotanine is a seemingly humanoid multitasker and versatile being who occasionally also works on composing music for her films, and has tried her luck in experimental music projects with her very talented musicians friends, where she put her lyrics and voice in spoken word, experimental and avant garde forms.

Whenever she runs out of money she plays music in several bars with her machinery and does radio shows with the ultimate goal of one day being able to communicate the messages she imagines to humanity. "HORA" live radio show is one of her diverse attempts to communicate her various elements to the wider world.

Name: GRiD
About:
GRiD (Constadinos X) is a Drum&Bass-Jungle Dj started since 1994. Heavily influenced by the d&b events he attended in UK the following years, he was the first to bring the sound in his hometown Volos. 7 years ago he got back in DJsets  for the love for it.

He has played alongside international DJs like Aries Priest,Jacky Murda, FLeCk, Mc Nino(Baby_D),Mc Gardna,V ixen Sound, Blend Mishkin and been acting as an ambassador for labels Spearhead, Blu Mar Ten , Future Retro Records & MURKT, introducing fresh and upcomings cuts straight from the source.

Apart from his show on Paranoise, you can also catch his "Future Funk" radio show on Nova FM 106.6 (Central Greece).

Booking info: interfacemusic73@gmail.com If you want your music to be played on the air you can contact through the mail above.

Name: Gross Diskos
About: Maximum self-expression paths lit by the DIY torch held high as the mighty underground sky! Gross Diskos = dedicated to channeling energy into creating cassette tapes & unique musical treasure objects to our best liking and taste, audaciously exhibiting musical gems of aural sweetness supreme from the past, present and future. Smokin' subcultures exploding exploration!!!Ignition ==> space!!!

Name: Hexæ
About: HEXAE aka nuff has been blending bassy sounds for nearly 31 years, getting his hands on everything from jungle, 140 dubstep, electro, uk bass, baile funk plus anything that tickles his soul in a funny way. Hexae is also a member of "pony licks", a collective of musicians video artists and designers based in Thessaloniki.

Name: Ilian
About:
Based in Copenhagen, Illian plays a wide range of genres, from Industrial Techno, Dark Wave, EBM and Electro to Ambient and IDM. However, her show "Obscure Modulation" can go beyond these genres while she's exploring different genres and sounds.

Her goal is to normalize playing dark and dystopic music at any hour of the day.

Name: J Bunny
About: Jungle Bunny (SKG) started working as a DJ in 2015 in various nightclubs in Thessaloniki and so far has appeared in several bass music events and festivals.For the last three years she has been the main co-organizer of jungle massive events with guests from Greece and abroad.

Name: Jaap
About: Jaap is a passionate DJ blending Bass, Club, Breaks, Broken Techno, Dubstep. He has been deeply inspired by the UK bass music scene and its diverse subgenres, and strives to bring that same energy and enthusiasm to his sets. With a focus on powerful basslines, intricate rhythms, and genre-blending experimentation, his show aims to create an immersive and engaging experience for the audience

Name: Jahnabet
About:
Ο Jahnabet διατηρεί εδώ και 10 χρόνια την εκπομπή Irie Trip. Επηρεασμένος από την κουλτούρα των Soundsystem ξεκίνησε εκπομπές παίζοντας dub χρησιμοποιώντας σειρήνες και εφέ. Τα τελευταία χρόνια σαφώς επηρεασμένος από τον ήχο του σταθμού άρχισε να επεκτείνει τα μουσικά του ακούσματα πάντα κρατώντας την dub αισθητική. Παράλληλα με τις εκπομπές ξεσκονίζει περιστασιακά τα δισκάκια του σε διάφορα bar και πάρτι της πόλης

//

Jahnabet has been hosting the Irie Trip show for 10 years. Influenced by Soundsystem culture he started shows playing dubs using sirens and effects. In recent years, clearly influenced by the paranoise sound, he began to expand his musical taste, always keeping a dub aesthetic. Alongside the shows, he occasionally dusts off his vinyls at various bars and parties in the city

Name: Jessie Onze
About:
Jessie Onze is an Athens-based DJ & artist. Resident at Fade & Paranoise, he is also an occasional guest on Radio Raheem, Retreat Radio & Public Internet Radio, and collaborates with labels such as Jollies Records & Akuphone. For he meets all musics with same enthusiasm, Jessie has grown into an unpredictable selector, freely breaking barriers between genres and times. His show on Paranoise, Years of Break-Up, focuses on the darker side of his playlists, blending weeping melodies, noises & painful techno cuts into uncanny and disturbed atmospheres.

https://soundcloud.com/jessie-onze
https://mastodon.social/@jessieonze
https://www.instagram.com/jessie_onze/

Name: Jim Captain
About:
Jim Captain is a Dj based in Thessaloniki, Greece. Ηis interest in music began at a young age playing saxophone and guitar as well as experimenting with radio producing. During the recent years, his focus aims on exploring the musical universe trying to combine and find connections between the tribal origin sounds and modern experimentations.

He is a record collector of both classical and contemporary music, with a preference in World , Disco, Bass, Techno and Electronic sounds. The last years he has been playing music in multiple venues and has participated in various events in Thessaloniki and abroad.

Name: Kappa
About:
Musician and DJ from Thessaloniki known as Kappa Music Library. Also, a co-founder of the multi-dimensional group Watara Matara, his soul knows no musical boundaries.

‍

Name: Kirchoff
About: Kirchoff joined the Paranoise Radio family in 2022 with the monthly radio show Cicadas. He is a dj-producer & filmmaker based in Thessaloniki. Mostly involved with sounds of non western world descent Kirchoff’s music travels through Africa, Central & Latin America & The Arab World, while always keeping a warm place for the sound of Detroit & New Orleans. From a blend of psychedelic funk, soul and dance-jazz grooves, among the rhythms of funana, mpb, oriental and caribbean fusion, up to the contemporary electronic scene with emerging techno, grime, industrial and acid sounds from these parts of the world. A keen record collector, he is a resident dj in various nightclubs and bars in the city of Thessaloniki.

Name: Kyvie
About: Kyvie started working as a DJ in 2016, in various nightclubs and festivals in Thessaloniki, Xanthi, Komotini and Kavala. Some of her best moments were the opening acts for Perc Trax and Brvtal Vision at SKG Techno Mayhems, along with opening sets for Suburbass, Stranger, Amotik and many locals. Lately started her own music productions, with contribution of 2 tracks to the VA PRNS compilation albums.Kyvie plays a wide range of genres, from Hypnotic to Hard and Acid Techno, Electro Break Beats and IDM. Her sets have powerful basslines and emotional melodies.

Name: Ladies on Records
About: Ladies on Records AKA Kornelia Binicewicz - Polish origin record collector. DJ and anthropologist of culture currently living in Istanbul, Turkey. In 2015, she moved to Istanbul to explore female music from Turkey and the Middle East. Daily, she lives on the island near Istanbul travels all around the world in search of mesmerizing music and meaningful stories to tell.

Name: Loki
About: DJ/radio producer and vinyl collector since 2008 and 2015, respectively, serving music out of the box.

Name: Mr Collage
About: Mr. Collage is digging the classics of Funk, Soul and Cinematic music and crafts his style around the traditional hip hop sound, utilising the use of samples as well as recorded instruments. A kaleidoscopic array of beats is produced, lots of collaborations take place in the studio and on stage whiletravellling around by his sampler and a couple of synths to share his music.

Name: Nervous Tribe
About:
Nervous Tribe aka Plughead is Stefanos Monastiridis, a Greece-born DJ, producer and record collector, permanently residing in Brussels.

He joined Paranoise in 2010 and his show has been on air ever since. Known for his wider than wide music taste, he uses his monthly show on Paranoise to rediscover his record collection live on air and experiment by bringing seemingly unrelated styles together in polymorphic, often psychedelic blends.

Beyond Paranoise, Stefanos is also a resident at Kiosk Radio (BE) & Radio Alhara (PS), now and then produces music as Plughead and spins records for sweaty dancers in Brussels and beyond.

Name: Ni Moya
About: Saturnian Rites is a hermetic radio show revealing music from the vast spectrum of cryptic weirdness. Ranging from ambient and drone rituals to electronic bleeps and psychedelia, the show will feature recurring thematic episodes guided by whims of the mind. I am the entity called Ni Moya, bassist and vocalist of the psych rock band Naxatras, also writing electronic music and dj'ing.

Name: Nikolaos Mouchalempis
About: Nikolaos Mouchalempis is an artist with a multi-faceted approach in music. You can find him behind the decks either as a DJ or live act under the aliases "Nicola Regulus" & "Pollux Rose". His music is a mix of a wide spectrum of music genres depending on the circumstances ranging from jazz, disco to house, breaks, IDM and techno. He is also a highly trained pianist which he incorporates in his live performances. He has released music as "Pollux Rose" on Fever AM and Numb Capsule and on Claap records with his "Nicola Regulus" alias. Nowadays, Nikolaos is a member of "Colorblind" collective.

Name: Node (Gated Recordings)
About:
One half of Gated Recordings, Node is here to provide a whole load of entertaining electronics, chopping out the best from many different genres with a focus on bass, atmosphere and eclecticism including new beats from the Gated label and friends.

Gated facebook page - https://www.facebook.com/gatedrecordings

Insta - https://www.instagram.com/gatedrecordings

Name: Not Now
About:
Not Now is a team of DJs and producers, running Thessaloniki's impactful clubnights-turned-label, Not Now Records.Not Now started organising mobile parties in 2016, hosting clubnights with some of the best local talent and international guests from the Club, Bass and Grime and Footwork scene.

Om Unit, Sinjin Hawke & Zora Jones, Last Japan, Etch, Itoa, Akito, Slugabed and Goro were some of the artists introduced to the city's audience over the years. In 2019 they started Not Now Records, with the first official release, NN00, arriving on vinyl- a collection of tracks by Not Now residents & close affiliates- followed by Akito's Undercurrent EP the next year and WRACK's Ice Effect EP in 2022.

Since 2021, residents Radio Etc, George Next and DJillys host Not Now's monthly show on Paranoise Radio, promoting the freshest releases and airing exclusive bootlegs and guest mixes by some of their favourite DJs and producers.

‍

Name: Ntavisia Brave
About: Born in Thessaloniki, currently living in Crete where she started radio pruducing and djing. Member of an independent music team which organized experimental live / sets and parties based on industrial music in Herakleion. Mouth of the Night brings new wave aesthetics mixed up with intense emotions and a sub-techno beat from below. As Indicated by the radio show's name, industrial music together with techno beats and 80s culture are be the shows' protagonists.

Name: Nuances & Computer Cowboy
About: Nuances & Computer Cowboy is a duo broadcasting from Thessaloniki.Their show "True Blue" -given by the name- is an ode to feeling blue, a combination of gloomy ambient tunes and songs that simply make them shiver.Nuances is a local producer and guitarist, highly inspired by blues. His creations blend ambient textures with sweet & silly melodies, all under the freedom of improvisation. Computer Cowboy is the alt of baggymilziade, a DJ and a cowboy (lie). This alt is solely focused around creating cinematic soundscapes via mixing

Name: OLIA
About:
1/2 of AXINOI. Digging, creating mixtapes and djing at bars in a desperate need to relate. LOW CLASS BOURGEOIS is a monthly one hour set recorded from my bedroom, including synth, experimental electronic, new wave & ambient sounds. Sometimes maybe talking, alone or not.
(https://www.mixcloud.com/itsAXINOI/)

(https://www.facebook.com/olia.vein/)

Name: One Body Problem &  Manju
About: Pandecter is the title of Roman cook Apicius' fourth book. The dishes aim to span the culinary dimensions of taste, texture and technique. Like Apicius, One Body Problem and Manjū will be showcasing fine ingredients from their wide musical diets each month. From appetisers to gruel. From the slowly simmering to the finely minced. Prepared simply, and presented thoughtfully.

Name: Padaczka
About: Started some years ago with parties and radio shows, padaczka is a solo project dedicated to deejaying and music production. Always supports the DIY scene.

Name: Pan Far
About: Pan Far is a DJ located in Thessaloniki. He loves vinyl. He's also a radio producer. He joined Paranoise in 2013. He loves Thursdays. His favorite color is blue.

Name: Phutyle
About:
Phutyle has been a collector of electronic music since the 1990's amassing close to 20k records to date and still counting! The collection started with classic Warp, Rephlex, underground rave and techno releases quickly expanding to include a wide range of electronic styles and genres. Phutyle's monthly show "From my Room to Yours" began on paranoiseradio.com during the lockdown of 2020.

Each show brings the listener along on an aural journey of new and old electronic music from Phutyle's collection who is frantically digging through the shelves and precarious stacks of records in the background to select what is coming next in the mix on the wheels of steel.

Name: Psontis
About: Tunes & fumes is about beats, rhymes and showcasing the best hip hop has to offer from the household arena filling names down to the soundcloud sourced underground talent, on a monthly basis, a show where Psontis finds himself going full circle through the dancefloor and massive rigs all the way to the outer edges of electroacoustic experimentalism only to land back to the style and culture that shaped him in the first place.

Name: Raten
About: Evi aka Raten has been listening to music everywhere and always, so inevitably got drawn to Paranoise. Her first time on air was with a guest mix featured at Silenic's Elusive Soundscapes show, while she kicked off her own thing on air in our 16th season

Name: Runner
About: Connecting the dots is what drives Runner. Pushing, playing & promoting the low end continuum from his 90s days in the UK all the way to today’s landscape and into the future. Constantly 'going back to go forward' through his #SubbedOut & #237Sessions on @Paranoise & @stegi-radio respectively, the one-off block parties in the ancient city under his banner, the legacy with Dimensions Festival launches in Athens & reppin' the Swamp81 family in the city. In the last few years we find him setting up a variety of significant projects with his friends that by the end of 2017 brought us #Shuffle, the party mostly based on ‘superior blend’ DJs mainly from the UK. Josey Rebelle, Jon K, Shanti Celeste, A Made Up Sound, Peach combined with local talent have rumbled the foyer of Mikrokosmos cinema,  #Shuffle's spiritual home. Finally to be able to shake the Romantso basement with the @Swamp81 take over of Chunky, Loefah & Sumgii in 28th of Feb 2020, just-before-everything-shut-down is pure gold. Cue in 4 yrs and a pandemic later, it is now 2024 and radio, DJing & pushing the envelope with likeminded cats in and out of the city helps to fight attention deficits and focus on the music & the people first & foremost #thehungerisreal#stayhealthy #hanginthere #getdown and remember there is no such thing as information overload, only filter failure >>>

Name: Sankt
About:
Florian Sankt releases music as Sankt and Shō, exploring mutant club music with the first moniker and a more experimental ambient sound with the latter. He is also running the Berlin-based label Crux Axul together with Lymbs. Collaborative records and live shows, music for exhibitions and a podcast opening were also developed by Sankt and he is always open for bookings 🙃

The bi-monthly radio show Advanced Materials is a shapeshifter. Sometimes other artists join Sankt, given permission to explore the sound or theme they see fit, but usually limited to electronic music. Solo shows tend to focus on forward-thinking and broken club music, but one-off shows like a Christmas choral music special are always possible, too.

Name: Satanakey
About: Music digger, DJ, radio producer, musician. She mixes lost and found sounds from around the world, crossing genres and trying to narrate sonic stories. Or something like that.

Name: Shy Nee
About:
Shy Nee is a veteran-skilled with a pro mindset Greek electronic musician, mixing and mastering engineer and radio producer. He has vast experience in audio/video engineering and has been creating audio content for soundtracks and theatrical shows, for the past 15 years. Notable mentions are collaborations with Plus Records, Music Kitchen, VIM Records, Liquid Drops & Jungle Drops labels. Since the early days in his career, he has been applying sonic wizardry in projects involving pre- and post-production, including TV shows and movies.

‍

Name: Silenic
About: Underground rave and UK bass culture connoisseur. Spreading the word through Paranoise Radio family for 12 continuous years.

Name: Spaced Cowboy
About: Athens based Aries, musician, producer & DJ.

Name: ΣΠΡΕΫ
About: ΣΠΡΕΫ is an alias side broadcasting project run by Gru. It began in 2019 as a research and audiophile need for tracking down and diggin worlwide folk, urban and underground sounds.

Name: Submersion Records
About: Record label from Thessaloniki, Greece. We release limited edition cassettes and CDs of experimental, ambient & avant garde music.

Name: SuperGeil
About:
Dj and Turntablist from Brussels (Belgium), she enjoys beats and vinyl records since she started to walk. Voracious music lover, she also organizes scratch jams every two months called « Bruxelles Cuts » where fellow Turntablists & curious can meet and share skills.
She loves live venues and radio shows to share her passion for good vibes.
You can follow her adventures on Instagram and all other platforms.

Name: SVT
About: Started spinning vinyls at the age of 15. Now back at it on mp3 - A soft spot for break beat, hip hop, g funk, downtempo lounge, deep house, funk and the 90's rave culture.

Name: Taki Onqoy
About: Founding member of the Barcelona collective Foggy Hex and music nerd, Jorge Páez began DJing the dark basements of his native city Líma, where he found a space of joy and universal connection in sound. After a long journey playing for free-form radio outlets and selecting music for curious crowds between Portland, Brussels, and Barcelona (where he's based at the moment), Páez now uses the moniker Taki Onqoy to navigate, with a naive sense of wonder, the intersection between dub, leftfield pop, and "other music" influenced by all sorts of mysterious and global sounds.

Name: Tendts
About:
Tendts are 3 Aquarius that make music that you can dance to, or not! The Pleiadian Power Trio they formed performs live it's own mixture of psychedelic, space disco, African acid, rave and it's gonna blow your mind and feet!

A mutlilayered musical universe unfolds. Intergalactic travellers with their congas, synths, guitars and drum machines. Three Aquarius preaching THE cosmic truth. Cosmic Swimmer Era is here.We are all Cosmic Swimmers.Are you ready to move your body in ways you've never experienced before?Get on board Aquarius 3 and find the truth.

Chris & Fotis & Elias Tendts have toured around Europe and shared the stage with names like Tim Sweeney, Daphni, Death in Vegas, Palmbomen II, BadBadNotGood, oOoOO, Kink and more. Furthermore they have presented their live in various festivals with the highlight being Sonar Festival as We Are Europe affiliates.

‍
They have released seven ep's (vinyl, cassette & digital), the latest being 'Cosmic Swimmer' on Public Release packed with remixes from Soulwax, Kim Ann Foxman & Eric Duncan. Their first full length was 'Cheap Poetry' released on Fair Weather Friends records back in 2015. After four years, 2019 came and finally they took the big step of creating their own imprint, T.A.F. recordings (Tendts And Friends) and released their second album 'Faith' on 23rd October 2020. Now T.A.F recordings is the home of several projects run by Chris, Fotis and Elias.

Name: Thomas Priest
About:
Παλιός νιουγεηβας στα νιάτα του εξακολουθεί να είμαι κολλημένος με την alternative μουσική σκηνή τόσο την παρούσα όσο και του παρελθόντος.

Thomas Priest was a new wave freak back in the day and still hooked on guitar riffs from the past and present. Tune in to his weekly radio show for a healthy dose of alternative rock and its siblings.

Name: Thomey Bors
About:
Thomey Bors seems to have been around forever and under many guises. Primarily an eclectic dj, shifting with ease between hip hop, electronica, house, techno, funk, disco or whatever catches his fancy, he is also a producer whose output defies immediate categorization. From glitchy beats and lofi aesthetics to emotive electronica and Detroit- esque techno, from shiny disco re-edits to trippy acid bleeps, there is a versatility of sounds that occupy his headspace, which actually form his trademark: constant genre defiance. Approach with open-mindedness and you won’t be disappointed.

‍

Ο Thomey Bors ανέκαθεν βρικόταν πίσω από μια πληθώρα παραγωγών και ψευδωνύμων. Πρωτίστως ένας επιλεκτικός dj που κινείται με άνεση μεταξύ hip hop, electronica, house, techno, funk, disco ή οποιοδήποτε είδος του τραβάει την προσοχή, είναι επίσης ένας παραγωγός του οποίου τα tracks δεν κατηγοριοποιούνται εύκολα. Από glitchy beats και lofi αιθητική μέχρι συναισθηματική electronica και Detroit-οειδές techno, από λαμπερά disco re- edits μέχρι trippy acid bleeps, υπάρχει ένα πλήθος ήχων που κατοικούν στο κεφάλι του, οι οποίοι ουσιαστικά δημιουργουν το χαρακτηριστικό του : συνεχής αναθεώρηση των ορίων.

Name: Tyke
About: Stefanis Christos aka Tyke is an engineer, a DJ and a records collector. His influences are from a wide range from Ambient & Techno to Punk. Longing for a time he didn’t live, he aims to spread love.

Name: Vegapunk & Twicechild
About: Vegapunk:Member of "The Antilopes" music collective. Hip Hop head. Jamaican bass lover. Gamer by heart. Sarcastic by default. Twicechild:Alexios "Twicechild" Antilope is a hip hop selector since 2004. As a Radio Producer he maintained his "Watch the Ride" show, through several iterations, focusing mainly on new releases. Being the second part of the Northern Antilopes, his approach on a hip hop dj set has been met with the approval of enthusiasts and hiphop-heads. Nowadays, he works inside the Granny's Parlor, "where hip hop grows up".

Name: Winter in Venice
About: A wild selection of sounds from the great friends orbiting around the agency. Experimental electronics, improvised beats and dreampunk textures in short bursts of inspiration and complete freedom.

Name: Yardy
About:
Monthly sonic exploration featuring ambient, noise, punk, free jazz & modular improvisation


‍

Name: Zas & Cerb
About: ZAS and CERB, born and live in Thessaloniki, are lifelong friends, Hip Hop heads with a fetish and love for music and vinyl. They are founders of 100% Rap, a series of Hip Hop parties. Partners in SP404 live gigs, they play lo-fi, abstract and Hip-Hop beats.ZAS is an MC and DJ, experimenting on SP404sx, beat making and forming live sets.CERB occasionally features as a DJ at Hip-Hop parties. He likes scratching and cutting, while messing up with beats and loops on SP404.
